name: James Dean
title: James Dean - taken 9/30/55 died in car wreck later that day 9/30/55, 24
description: James Dean - taken 9/30/55 died in car wreck later that day 9/30/55, 24
bio: James Dean was an American actor who became a cultural icon of teenage disillusionment and social estrangement. His roles in "Rebel Without a Cause" and "East of Eden" defined a generation.
